content:textarea:2:95.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:95.html: Thanks to the generosity of donors and partners in our community, we have winter coats available to share for men, women and children in all sizes.

content:text:3:21.name: Heading
content:text:3:21.html: How to Receive a Winter Coat
content:text:3:21.content: How to Receive a Winter Coat
content:text:3:21.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:11:64-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:4:31.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:4:31.html: Winter coats are available to share with men, women and children in a variety of sizes. To receive a coat at no cost, visit The Salvation Army of Greenville Area Command located at 417 Rutherford Street during normal business hours Monday through Friday. Ask to speak with either Men's Shelter Resident Manager Gonza Bryant or Women's Shelter Resident Manager Sarah Finley.

content:textarea:6:29.html: If you'd like to donate to The Salvation Army of Greenville continue to support our most vulnerable neighbors when they need it most, click the button below.
